ABOUT US

About Mohit Enterprise Group

A Trusted Name in Thawe

Mohit Enterprise Group (MEG) is a growing business conglomerate proudly rooted in Thawe, Gopalganj, Bihar. Founded by Sheshnath Gupta with a vision to serve the community with trust and excellence, MEG has grown to operate two successful retail businesses under one roof.

Our first venture, Mohit Mobile, caters to all your digital needs — from mobile accessories and repairs to online ticket booking and government form filling. Our second venture, Mohit General Store, is your one-stop shop for cosmetics, gift items, decoration pieces, trolley bags, and daily household essentials.

Strategically located at Sukulwa Market, directly in front of Thawe Railway Station, we are easily accessible to both locals and travelers. Our motto — "Trust • Service • Quality" — guides everything we do.

2+
Shops
7
Days Open
1000+
Happy Customers

Trust

Built on years of honest dealing and transparent service to our customers.

Quality

We stock only the best products and deliver services with the highest standards.

Service

Customer satisfaction is our top priority. We go above and beyond every time.

Community

Proudly serving the Thawe community and surrounding areas for years.

Excellence

Recognized for our commitment to quality and exceptional customer care.

Reliability

Open 7 days a week, 7 AM to 8 PM. Always there when you need us.

OUR PEOPLE

The Faces Behind MEG

Meet the dedicated people who make Mohit Enterprise Group the trusted name it is today.

FOUNDER & OWNER

Sheshnath Gupta

Mohit Enterprise Group

Sheshnath Gupta is the visionary founder and owner of Mohit Enterprise Group. With deep roots in the Thawe community and an unwavering commitment to honest business, he built MEG from the ground up with the simple philosophy: "Serve people with trust, quality, and a smile."

Under his leadership, MEG has grown to two successful retail ventures, employing local talent and serving thousands of satisfied customers across Thawe, Gopalganj, and surrounding areas.

EntrepreneurshipCommunity ServiceCustomer FocusLeadership

OUR SHOP 1

Mohit Mobile

Your digital service hub for mobile accessories, online services, ticket booking, printing and much more. All under one roof.

+91 99734 82789

All Digital Services in One Place

Mohit Mobile is your go-to destination for everything digital in Thawe. Whether you need a mobile cover, need to book a train ticket, or want to get your documents printed — we've got you covered. We provide fast, reliable, and affordable services with a friendly smile.

OUR SHOP 2

Mohit General Store

From cosmetics and beauty products to gifts, decoration, and household essentials — everything you need for everyday life.

+91 82927 30936

Everything You Need, Every Day

Mohit General Store is a beautifully curated retail shop offering a wide range of products for all ages. Whether you're looking for a thoughtful gift, beauty essentials, elegant decoration pieces, or simply stocking up on daily household items — you'll find it all here.

We take pride in offering quality products at competitive prices. Our store is carefully organized to make your shopping experience pleasant and convenient.

Our team is always ready to assist you with a warm smile and professional service.

Quality Products

Quick turnaround on all services — we value your time as much as you do.

TESTIMONIALS

What Our Customers Say

“Mohit Mobile is the best shop in Thawe! Got my train ticket booked in minutes and they also have great mobile accessories. Very helpful staff.”

R

“I always buy my beauty products and gifts from Mohit General Store. Great variety, genuine products, and the prices are very fair. Highly recommended!”
